scope: retrospective multi-repository candidate-set audit; not prospectively registered PRISMA
search_streams: GEO: (keloid OR hypertrophic scar OR burn scar OR pathological scar) AND (expression profiling OR RNA sequencing OR single cell OR spatial transcriptomics)
GEO: keloid AND (drug OR knockdown OR siRNA OR inhibitor OR treatment OR perturbation)
PRIDE/ProteomeXchange and Europe PMC: keloid proteomics OR hypertrophic scar proteomics
PubMed and publisher supplements: pathological-scar single-cell, spatial, proteomic and perturbation studies published through 14 July 2026
deduplication: accession-level; overlapping accessions and source-study derivatives are flagged rather than counted as independent validation
